title: Nimbu's: Scabbards
description: Vanilla-friendly scabbards that allow you to sheath your sword.
body:
![Nimbu icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32ce7015222543ea15fb62d5f1c9de8148cd9a1a.png)

Welcome to Nimbu's: Scabbards - a mod intended to add vanilla friendly dyeable scabbards to hold your sword.

Swords can be drawn (and sheathed) at any time with the R key, and will move your current held item elsewhere in your inventory, allowing for easy item management.

## Required Dependencies:
- [Curios API 1.21.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios/version/9.5.1+1.21.1)

# Guide (Short):

## Scabbard:

Scabbards are crafted with three leather and one string:

![Scabbard crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8be572e3a2fe68217753656b7c85238eb196e77.png)

## Dyeing:

Scabbards can be dyed the same way that leather armour can. Just add any amount of dye with the scabbard in a crafting table.

## Big Scabbard:

A functionally identical larger variation of the scabbard.

![Big scabbard crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6030ab8c372fb11f9a8520fe926f603a700f0bb.png)

## Weapon Holster:

The weapon holster is a small strap of leather designed to store tools of any size - not simply limited to carrying swords! Crafted with one leather and two string.
![Weapon holster crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b85b7d3a8ea9f00382db243a9dd8487440fac5a.png)
